title: SDL ServiceManifest
description: The bounded container for a software service description. One manifest per repo. Declares what this service is, what it owns, and what interfaces it exposes and consumes.

dl.notes: ServiceManifest is the top-level Container in SDL at layer_logic. It groups all Operations (Units) within a single service boundary. The synthesis tool reads exposes[] and consumes[] to construct ServiceActor objects at layer_platform.

dlVersion.description: The SDL spec version this file conforms to.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for this service. Stable — used as a reference key by entry-points, dependencies, and synthesis tools.

label.description: Human-readable display name for this service.

description.description: One paragraph describing what this service owns and why it exists. Write for a senior engineer reading it cold.

domain.description: The business domain this service belongs to. Aligns with DDD bounded contexts.

responsibilities.description: Plain-language list of what this service is responsible for.

exposes.description: The interfaces this service exposes to the outside world. Written in protocol-prefixed notation. These become the ServiceActor.exposes[] at layer_platform.

consumes.description: External interfaces this service depends on. These become the ServiceActor.consumes[] at layer_platform.

contracts.description: Links to external contract definitions this service owns.

stats.description: Auto-generated summary counts. Populated by tooling, not hand-authored.
